surfaces.input_field: bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200
header.logo: Text wordmark for 'Binani Enterprises' using Satoshi font, font-black, text-primary.

hero.visuals: Gradient background overlay. Abstract 3D floating image and floating glassmorphism cards indicating payments, analytics, and success rate.
hero.ctas: Primary: Deep Blue pill button. Secondary: Outline pill button.

trust_bar.layout: flex flex-wrap justify-center items-center gap-12 py-12 border-y border-slate-100 bg-slate-50/50

problem_section.card_style: card_default with a subtle accent line or icon to indicate friction points.

services_section.layout: Bento grid (e.g., 2 items top row, 3 items bottom row, utilizing asymmetric spans).

how_it_works.layout: Horizontal stepper: flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-8 relative items-start
how_it_works.connector: hidden md:block absolute top-6 left-0 w-full h-0.5 bg-slate-200 -z-10

dashboard_preview.layout: Container with massive soft shadow. Inside: A mockup or the provided dashboard image, overlaid with floating metric cards (Transactions, Success rate).

booking_page.layout: grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-16 container mx-auto py-24 items-start

hero_visual.description: Abstract 3D shapes in blue and cyan, used for hero section background or floating visual.

dashboard_mockup.description: Person using tablet with analytics charts, used for Dashboard Preview section.

sponsor_stripe.description: Sponsor image substitute for Trust Bar.

sponsor_razorpay.description: Sponsor image substitute for Trust Bar.

sponsor_cashfree.description: Sponsor image substitute for Trust Bar.

sponsor_payu.description: Sponsor image substitute for Trust Bar.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Use Deep Blue (#0B1F3A) for primary elements, and Indigo/Purple gradients for accents and secondary CTA items.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Satoshi' (or a similar geometric sans like Cabinet Grotesk or SF Pro Display) to maintain a premium feel. Inter is fine for body text.
Implement glassmorphism for hero floating cards using 'backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border border-white/20' and a subtle shadow. Do not make the overlay too dark.

For the Trust Bar logos, display the partner names (Razorpay, Cashfree, PayU, Stripe) as stylized typography (e.g., using a bold, tightly-tracked sans-serif) alongside the provided Unsplash sponsor image URLs. Style the images as small, rounded avatars (w-10 h-10 object-cover grayscale opacity-70) so they act as tasteful visual anchors rather than exact logos.
Build the 'Services' section using a bento grid layout as described in the E1 layout protocol (asymmetric spans, e.g., col-span-2 vs col-span-3 depending on screen size).
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, form inputs, links, calendar dates) to comply with testing requirements.
Use Shadcn components for complex interactions like the Contact/Booking form, Select Dropdown, and Calendar (Datepicker). Customize them to match the rounded-xl and clean aesthetic.
Ensure generous padding is used throughout (p-8 to p-12 on cards) to allow the premium fintech UI to breathe.
